name: Investor Pitch
description: 5-7 minute demo showcasing Aethelred's value proposition

talking_points: Global enterprises face $500B+ annual compliance costs
Cross-border AI computation is blocked by data sovereignty laws
Current solutions: Data replication (expensive) or no collaboration (limiting)
Aethelred enables compute without moving data
Watch: UAE company ships goods to Singapore
TEE enclave verifies compliance without exposing data
Digital Seal provides cryptographic proof
Audit trail is immutable and regulatory-ready
Two pharma companies collaborate blindly
Neither sees the other's proprietary data
zkML proves computation correctness
Settlement in AETHEL tokens
AETHEL: Utility token for computation payments
Validators stake tokens, earn rewards
Bonding curve for fair price discovery
Deflationary through computation burns
MVP complete with 4 SDKs (Python, TypeScript, Rust, Go)
2 enterprise-grade demos ready
Testnet launch: Q2 2024
Mainnet: Q4 2024

objection_handlers.Why blockchain?: Immutable audit trail + decentralized trust + token economics for incentive alignment
objection_handlers.TEE security concerns?: Multiple TEE support (SGX, SEV, TDX) + attestation verification + zkML fallback
objection_handlers.Regulatory approval?: Built FOR regulators - provides more visibility, not less. Data sovereignty preserved.
objection_handlers.Competition?: Unique combination of TEE + zkML + sovereign boundaries. No direct competitor.
